Home.heroSubtitle: Backing & Score is a play-along library with interactive sheet music and real-time pitch detection — a useful tool for musicians who want to practice at their own pace.
Home.waitModeTitle: Wait Mode — practice one note at a time.
Home.waitModeDesc: When Wait Mode is on, the backing tracks go silent and the sheet music pauses at each note. Connect your microphone or a MIDI keyboard, play the note, and the score moves forward once the pitch matches. A simple way to slow down and be more deliberate.
Home.ctaTitle: A useful addition to your practice routine.
Home.ctaSubtitle: Give it a try and see if it fits the way you practice.
Home.f2Desc: The Academy hosts courses written by musicians and teachers. Lessons combine written explanations with short practice segments — you read the theory, then play through a snippet to confirm the idea before moving on.
Home.f3Desc: Each song in the library can include separate instrument stems. Mute the piano track to practice that part yourself, or solo one instrument to listen closely. The mixer lets you control the balance any way you like.
Home.ctaSubtitleFull: Explore the library, connect your instrument, and see how it feels.
Home.footerCopy: © 2026 Backing & Score. Interactive sheet music for musicians.
Home.f4Desc: Explore musicians, instruments, genres, and compositions. Backing & Score connects rich encyclopedic knowledge directly to playable tracks and practice sheets.

Academy.welcomeSubtitle: Courses that pair written music theory with short practice exercises. Read a concept, then play it through in the browser — your instrument validates the work.
Academy.noCoursesSubtitle: Educators are currently building the first set of courses.
Academy.defaultCourseDesc: Learn the basics of music theory with interactive exercises in your browser.

Login.subtitle: Log in to your Backing & Score account

Guide.heroSubtitle: A quick walkthrough of the main features — from browsing the library to practicing with Wait Mode and creating your own course.
Guide.s1Body: Browse the Discover page for songs and collections. Hit Play to hear the sheet music with backing tracks. Connect a microphone or MIDI keyboard, then toggle Wait Mode — the backing tracks mute and the score pauses at each note until you play it correctly.
Guide.s1WaitNote: Waiting for the correct note to continue...
Guide.s2Body: The Academy contains structured courses from educators. Each lesson combines written explanations with practice snippets. Some sections require you to play through a short exercise before the next lesson unlocks.
Guide.s3Body: Teachers can write lessons using a simple text editor, then embed a music snippet from their library and mark it as a practice requirement. No coding needed — the system handles the audio validation.
Guide.s4Body: Songs with multiple stems let you control each instrument independently. Open the mixer to mute or solo any track — handy when you want to practice one part while the rest of the band plays.

UserGuide.pageSubtitle: Everything you need to know about Backing & Score
UserGuide.discoverBody: Search songs, composers, and styles. Browse featured collections and add favorites from the heart icon on any song.
UserGuide.playBody: Press Space to play/pause. Click any measure on the sheet to seek. Use the playback speed control to slow down without changing pitch.
UserGuide.waitModeBody: The music pauses at each note and waits for you to play it correctly before continuing. Requires microphone or MIDI input.
UserGuide.mixerBody: Mute one instrument to practice that part yourself. Solo isolates a single track. Volume and pan sliders are available per track.
UserGuide.collectionsBody: Collections are curated playlists of songs. Browse them on Discover, play all tracks, like, or share to your feed.
UserGuide.dashboardBody: Your personal library: uploaded pieces, collections, favourites, and creator courses — all in one place.
UserGuide.feedBody: Follow composers on Discover to build your musical network. Post updates and attach a score to share with your audience.
UserGuide.academyBody: Structured courses with interactive lessons. Some sections require you to play through correctly before unlocking the next lesson.
UserGuide.createProjectBody: In Dashboard → My Uploads, click '+ Create Piece', type a name, and you are taken straight to the Piece Editor.
UserGuide.editorBody: The main workspace: Transport Bar at the top, Sheet Music area in the middle, Track List at the bottom. Save and Publish buttons are in the top-right corner.
UserGuide.uploadScoreBody: Click the large upload zone in the Sheet Music area, or use the ⋯ menu → '+ MusicXML Score'. Supports .musicxml, .xml, and .mxl files.
UserGuide.uploadStemsBody: In the Track List, click '+ Add Audio Track' to add each instrument stem (drums, guitar, bass…). Adjust volume, pan, mute/solo, and offset per track.
UserGuide.tagsBody: Click the Tags button in the action bar to classify your song by genre, instrument, and difficulty level. Helps users find your content.
UserGuide.syncModeBody: Activate Sync Mode, then press Space on each measure downbeat as the audio plays. Save Map to store the audio-to-measure timemap for the playhead and Wait Mode.
UserGuide.coverArtBody: Click ⋯ menu → 'Upload Cover Art' to add a thumbnail. Shown on the Discover page and song detail view.
UserGuide.publishBody: Click the gold 'Publish' button to make your song public on Discover. Click 'Unpublish' to revert to draft at any time.
UserGuide.shareToFeedBody: After publishing, use ⋯ menu → 'Share to Feed' to post the song to your Activity Feed with a custom caption.
UserGuide.manageCollectionsBody: Create collections from Dashboard → Collections. Add songs via the song's ⋯ menu. Set the collection to Public or Private and upload a cover.
UserGuide.createCourseBody: In Dashboard → Creator Courses, create a course then write lessons using the Tiptap editor. Insert a Music Snippet node and enable 'Practice Required' to gate progress.
UserGuide.shortcutSpace: Play / Pause (or tap measure in Sync Mode)
UserGuide.shortcutClick: Click on a measure to seek to that position
UserGuide.creatorOnlyNote: Creator features require a Creator account. Contact an administrator to request Creator access.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.report_resolved: Your report on "{targetName}" has been reviewed

About.heroDesc: A comprehensive music platform — practice with real-time feedback, learn through structured courses, explore a rich music library, and connect with a community of music lovers.
About.p1Desc: Play along with backing tracks, get instant feedback
About.p1f1Desc: Play music and follow along. Adjust speed from 50%–200% without changing pitch. Click any measure to jump to the section you want to practice.
About.p1f2Desc: Music pauses at each note and waits for you to play correctly before continuing. Connect a microphone or MIDI device. Forces precision on every note.
About.p1f3Desc: Mute the Piano part to play it yourself. Solo an instrument to listen closely. Adjust volume per track — like playing with a real band.
About.p2Desc: Structured courses combining theory and practice
About.p2f1Desc: Structured courses from teachers. Read theory, then practice directly in the browser. Some lessons require playing correctly to unlock the next one.
About.p2f2Desc: Teachers create classes, assign exercises, and track each student's progress. Direct feedback and assessment.
About.p3Desc: Curated music library and music encyclopedia
About.p3f1Desc: Curated music library: Featured ⭐ · Recently Added 🆕 · Trending 🔥 · Most Favorited 🔖 · Collections 📚. Search and filter by instrument, genre, difficulty.
About.p3f2Desc: Music encyclopedia: artists, instruments, compositions, genres. Each page links directly to related practice pieces.
About.p3f3Desc: Create themed collections. Bookmark favorite pieces with the 🔖 Bookmark button. Easily return to practice later.
About.p4Desc: Share and connect with a community of music lovers
About.p4f1Desc: Follow your favorite musicians. Browse the timeline, share your practice progress, attach sheet music, comment and interact.
About.p4f2Desc: The notification bell lets you know when someone likes your piece, follows you, or comments on your content.
About.themeDesc: Comfortable in any lighting. Toggle via the button in the header.
About.ctaDesc: Open your browser, browse the library, and hit Play. No installation needed.
About.ctaFooter: Backing & Score — Practice · Learn · Discover · Connect
